description: Default capability set for the professional desktop shell. The bundled rpc sidecar is spawned from the Rust backend (ShellExt::sidecar in lib.rs), which runs with backend privileges and needs no frontend shell capability. The update check runs through the custom `check_for_update` command (app commands are not ACL-gated), so `updater:default` is included only for any future direct use of the updater plugin's JS API. core:event (in core:default) carries the `sidecar://rx` channel when CHAT_TRANSPORT=ipc.
